body.title: Memory schema v2: add payloads, edge_type, source_agent
body.result: m055 migrations: payloads JSONB + source_agent on clan.memories, edge_type + index on clan.interpretive_edges; models.py updated; 61 tests green (1 pre-existing in test_after_action_reviewer)
body.description:
Add three nullable columns to support the recall(X) retrieval architecture: (1) payloads jsonb on clan.memories for typed payload attachment (code, link, primitive, embedding); (2) edge_type varchar on interpretive_edges for typed relationship tracking (implements, contradicts, derived_from, co-activates); (3) source_agent varchar on clan.memories for multi-agent provenance. All columns nullable — zero breaking change to existing rows.

HIGH-inertia touch approved: Akien pre-approved memory/models.py touch 2026-05-28 — 'evolutionary improvement; schema did its job for hundreds of commits.'

**Affected files:** new migration file (next after m054_llm_calls), wild_igor/igor/memory/models.py (HIGH inertia, pre-approved)
**Design rules:** postgres only, no sqlite; nullable columns only — no backfill required
**Scope boundary:** schema migration only — no behavior change; no code that uses new columns (that belongs in T-memory-write-path and T-librarian-edge-maintenance)
**Test plan:** migration runs clean on fresh DB and on DB with existing rows; all three new columns exist with correct types; existing tests still pass
